title: Nether Villager Trader
description: Adds a new villager to the Nether, along with a unique structure where the villager sells both armor and weapons
body:
**Nether Villager Trader – NEW UPDATE Version 2.0.0**

This Mod adds a new villager to the game, the Nether Trader.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58caae4f42396c9bd1d6c62bd798902859fd99fe.png)

You will find the new trader in his Nether Mansion, which can spawn in Warped Forest biomes.

You can also get him by placing the new craftable Trader Block as his workstation.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96adb70460292977fbe8d5b59362855a9cb2fafa.png)


**Hell Gear:**

The trader sells a brand-new Hell Gear Set, consisting of Hell Armor and 3 new weapons — the Hell Sword, Hell Axe, and Hell Sickle.




**Hell Ingot**
- A new material that can be crafted by combining Iron and Blaze Powder.
- The trader also sells it directly.
- It can be used to repair all Hell Gear and to craft the Hell Sword.
All other Hell Gear can only be obtained by buying it from the trader.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f068061866428e67f0bf3d2e6e079afadff3254.jpeg)

**Hell Armor**
- A powerful new armor set with stats similar to Diamond Armor, but it does not burn in fire.
- Wearing the full set grants Fire Resistance.
- Only available at the Nether Trader.

**Weapons:**

**Hell Sword**
- Sets enemies on fire after hitting them.
- Can be either crafted using Hell Ingots or bought from the Nether Trader.

**Hell Sickle**
- A powerful weapon that inflicts the Wither effect on enemies.
- Press Right Click to dash forward, making it great for mobility.
- Only available at the trader.

**Hell Axe**
- A strong axe that causes a small explosion on hit and launches enemies into the air.
- Only available at the trader.

**Ghast Potion**
- A new potion that grants the Ghast Protection effect.
- Only available at the Nether Trader.

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
